data.title: RED test: Add escalate_review schema validation tests to test-validate-review-output.sh
data.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Description
Modify tests/hooks/test-validate-review-output.sh to add RED test cases for escalate_review field:
1. Findings JSON with valid escalate_review array (e.g. [{finding_index:0, reason:'uncertain severity'}]) passes code-review-dispatch validation
2. Findings JSON with malformed escalate_review (string instead of array) fails validation
3. Findings JSON with escalate_review element missing finding_index fails validation
4. Findings JSON without escalate_review field passes validation (field is optional)

Test approach: Create JSON fixtures with/without escalate_review field, pipe through validate-review-output.sh code-review-dispatch, assert exit codes.

All new tests must FAIL (RED) because validate-review-output.sh does not recognize escalate_review in optional_top yet.

## File Impact
- tests/hooks/test-validate-review-output.sh (modify)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test suite passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Test file contains at least 3 new test cases for escalate_review
  Verify: grep -c 'escalate_review' tests/hooks/test-validate-review-output.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 3)}'
- [ ] New escalate_review tests fail RED against current validate-review-output.sh
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-validate-review-output.sh 2>&1 | grep -q FAIL
